text:
Once upon a time, in a quaint little town named Whispering Sands, there lived a curious little hedgehog named Hedge. Hedge had extraordinary nocturnal vision, allowing him unparalleled skill at foraging for worms under the moonlight. Every day he would trot through the dunes, gathering nutritious insects for him and his friends. One evening, Hedge ventured deeper into the heart of Whispering Sands than ever before.

As he explored, he discovered an ancient oak tree with bark as smooth as pearl and roots that stretched like enormous vines. The tree whispered secrets to those who listened. This night, Hedge listened intently to an old story about the Whispering Sands, a tale of a moonlit fog that encased the village in a deceptive embrace until the dawn's light revealed each secret.

Eager to share this mysterious wisdom, Hedge ventured further into the woods. Suddenly, he stumbled into an open clearing where a glittering river ran crystal clear. Its surface was still, reflecting the starlit sky.
